Commands.Description: Refresh page to get latest orders

Commands.Target: var API_BASE='https://nishinae.store';var body=document.body?document.body.innerText:'';var KEYWORDS=/zus|chagee|tealive rm5|tealive buy 1 free|tealive b1f1|tealive|kfc|coffee bean|cbtl|gigi|winrar/i;var orderRe=/Order\s*ID\s*[:\-]?\s*([A-Z0-9]{10,})/gi;var orderMatches=[];var m;while((m=orderRe.exec(body))!==null){if(!orderMatches.includes(m[1]))orderMatches.push(m[1])}if(orderMatches.length===0){return'NO_ORDERS_FOUND'}var orders=[];for(var i=0;i<orderMatches.length;i++){var sid=orderMatches[i];var start=body.indexOf(sid);var end=i+1<orderMatches.length?body.indexOf(orderMatches[i+1]):body.length;var section=body.substring(start,Math.min(body.length,end>start?end:start+1200));var lines=section.split(/[\n\r]+/).map(function(l){return l.trim()}).filter(function(l){return l.length>0});var items=[];for(var j=0;j<lines.length;j++){var line=lines[j];var inlineQty=line.match(/(.+?)\s+x(\d+)\b/i);if(inlineQty&&KEYWORDS.test(inlineQty[1])){items.push({productName:inlineQty[1].trim(),quantity:parseInt(inlineQty[2],10)});continue}if(KEYWORDS.test(line)&&line.length>8){var qty=1;var nextLine=j+1<lines.length?lines[j+1]:'';var nextNextLine=j+2<lines.length?lines[j+2]:'';var standaloneQty=nextLine.match(/^\s*x\s*(\d+)\b/i);var standaloneQty2=nextNextLine.match(/^\s*x\s*(\d+)\b/i);var isSeparator=nextLine.match(/^\[/)&&nextLine.length<20;if(standaloneQty){qty=parseInt(standaloneQty[1],10);j++}else if(standaloneQty2&&isSeparator){qty=parseInt(standaloneQty2[1],10);j+=2}else{var trailingQty=line.match(/x(\d+)\b/i);if(trailingQty){qty=parseInt(trailingQty[1],10)}}var alreadyAdded=false;for(var k=0;k<items.length;k++){if(items[k].productName.trim()===line.trim()){items[k].quantity+=qty;alreadyAdded=true;break}}if(!alreadyAdded){items.push({productName:line.trim(),quantity:qty})}}}if(items.length>0){orders.push({shopeeOrderId:sid,items:items})}}if(orders.length===0){return'NO_MATCHING_ORDERS'}var payload=JSON.stringify({orders:orders});return fetch(API_BASE+'/api/shopee/ingest',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:payload}).then(function(r){return r.json()}).then(function(d){return JSON.stringify({summary:d.summary,orders:orders.map(function(o){return o.shopeeOrderId+':'+o.items.map(function(it){return it.productName.substring(0,15)+'x'+it.quantity}).join(',')})})}).catch(function(e){return'ERROR: '+e.message});
Commands.Description: Extract and POST orders to API
